nasb.text: Under the expanse their wings were stretched out straight, one toward the other; each one also had two wings covering its body on the one side and on the other.

esv.text: And under the expanse their wings were stretched out straight, one toward another. And each creature had two wings covering its body.

cnv.text: 在穹蒼下面，活物的翅膀伸直張開，互相接觸；各自用兩個翅膀遮蔽身體。

ccb.text: 穹苍下四个活物伸展翅膀，彼此相对，各用两个翅膀遮蔽身体。
